title: Shocked drivers spot ‘glowing alien UFO’ hovering above Florida highway
description: A FLORIDA driver has captured startling photos showing an eerie orange object streaking over a busy highway. The massive object and its trail of light can be seen against the pitch black night sky, with commenters across the internet weighing in on what it is. Fisherman Brandon Barton captured the mysterious sight while driving home...
